title: deer-flow.semantic_cache.hit v1
description: A semantic cache lookup returned a hit. Used to monitor retrieval efficiency and cache health.

query_hash.description: First 12 chars of the query embedding hash — avoids logging PII from long queries

cache_key.description: First 12 chars of the cache entry key

ttl_remaining_s.description: Seconds until this cache entry expires

age_s.description: Seconds since this entry was written to the cache
